lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Beginner Guide
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Start by learning how exploration, fusion, and progression connect. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle rewards experimentation, so early progress comes from gathering unusual materials, testing combinations, and unlocking your personal base camp.

steps.title: Explore Before You Commit
steps.description: Walk outward, mine common blocks, and keep any strange drops you find. Early progress is less about fixed quests and more about discovering what materials can become.

steps.title: Unlock Your Personal base camp Early
steps.description: Your personal base camp is one of the most important early milestones. It gives you a reliable place to regroup and build around.

steps.title: Use Osmium for Fast Early Progress
steps.description: Osmium is one of the most useful early materials. A popular early route is combining Osmium with sticks to make a Frost Pick for fast mining.

steps.title: Record Good Fusions
steps.description: Keep track of successful combinations in your journal. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle has many possible fusion paths, so writing down useful results saves a lot of time.

quickTips: Adventure Progression does not require a fixed recipe list.
Infinite world generation means moving higher or deeper can reveal completely different materials.
Movement tools and utility gear become a major quality-of-life boost once you start unlocking them.
Getting lost early is normal, but useful tools, storage, and movement options snowball fast once your first good fusions start working.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Adventure Progression Crafting
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: Adventure Progression is the game's unrestricted fusion system. Instead of memorizing a traditional recipe book, you combine materials, watch the result, and build your own crafting knowledge over time.

cards.name: Freeform Fusion
cards.description: Adventure Progression lets you fuse together different items without needing to follow a fixed recipe list.

cards.name: Multiple Useful Outcomes
cards.description: Different materials often push toward certain results. Community discoveries show that similar inputs can still lead to practical tools, storage, or combat upgrades.

cards.name: Journal-First Crafting
cards.description: The best way to learn Adventure Progression is to track your successful combinations. Your journal quickly becomes your own crafting reference.

cards.name: Community-Tested Early Fusions
cards.description: Popular early examples include Osmium plus Stick for a Frost Pick, Stick plus Tungsten Appendage for Azrael, and Azrael plus Magnetite for the Tendril Rapier.

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Tools and Weapons
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle mixes official utility gear with community-discovered early weapons. The best setup is usually a blend of fast mining, safe traversal, and one dependable combat option.

items.name: Frost Pick
items.description: A fast and affordable early pick made from Osmium and Stick. Players use it to speed up early material gathering.

items.name: Azrael
items.description: A practical early weapon route crafted from Stick and Tungsten Appendage.

items.name: Tendril Rapier
items.description: A stronger follow-up made by combining Azrael with Magnetite. It is one of the most useful early-mid combat paths shared by players.

items.name: Hookshot
items.description: An official traversal item that greatly improves movement and vertical exploration.

items.name: Bee Glider
items.description: An official movement item that helps cover space more safely and efficiently.

items.name: Ball Wand
items.description: An official ranged utility item that expands your combat and puzzle options.

items.name: Scuba Diving Gear
items.description: An official utility item for reaching areas that would otherwise slow down exploration.

items.name: Explosives
items.description: Officially highlighted as part of the core toolset and useful for breaking through threats or obstacles.

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Storage and Inventory
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: Inventory pressure starts early in Indiana Jones and the Great Circle, so building storage should be one of your first goals. Several real player-tested solutions already stand out.

solutions.name: Cache Cube
solutions.description: Cache Cubes are one of the earliest practical storage answers and are treated by players as the game's main chest-style container.

solutions.name: Cabinet
solutions.description: Cabinets are another confirmed storage option. A shared early recipe uses 1 Cut Wood and 1 String.

solutions.name: Personal base camp
solutions.description: Once unlocked, your personal base camp becomes a natural place to organize materials, craft in peace, and expand your base setup.

solutions.name: Journal Tracking
solutions.description: Recording useful combinations in your journal reduces wasted materials and makes inventory management much easier.

managementTips: Prioritize one dependable storage option before hoarding rare drops.
Build around your personal base camp once it becomes available.
Keep crafting materials, combat tools, and movement gear separated so upgrades are easier to plan.
Use your journal as part of inventory management, not just crafting discovery.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Adventure Books
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: Adventure Books are the core long-term upgrade system in Indiana Jones and the Great Circle. Track high-value unlocks early, then use map reveal books to speed up collectible cleanup in each major region.

cards.name: Punch Out I
cards.description: Region: The Vatican, Castel Sant'Angelo. Cost: 25 AP. Effect: restores stamina after a knockout. Priority: unlock early.

cards.name: Lucky Hat I
cards.description: Region: The Vatican, Captain's Room. Cost: 125 AP. Effect: second-chance recovery after getting knocked out.

cards.name: Moxie I, II, III
cards.description: Regions: Vatican, Gizeh, Sukhothai. Cost: 5/10/15 Medicine Bottles. Effect: extends stamina bar for exploration and combat.

cards.name: Shaping Up I, II, III
cards.description: Regions: Vatican, Gizeh, Sukhothai. Cost: 5/10/15 Medicine Bottles. Effect: adds extra health reserve bars.

highlights: Climbing Ace I and Pep I are strong early stamina picks for route efficiency.
Throttle and Jumbo Lasso improve stealth and heavy-enemy control in tougher encounters.
Fruit Bag is a practical sustain option when staying in the field longer.
Use Vatican, Gizeh, and Sukhothai map books before 100% cleanup.

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Trophies and Achievements
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Use this roadmap to plan a one-playthrough base-game completion route, then finish The Order of Giants DLC cleanup for full platform completion totals.

regions.name: Base PlayStation Trophies
regions.description: Includes 1 Platinum, 2 Gold, 15 Silver, and 28 Bronze. Typical completion time: 40-50 hours.

regions.name: Base Xbox Achievements
regions.description: Follows the same route as Steam completion: story progress, Fieldwork, Mysteries, collectibles, and Adventure Books.

regions.name: Missables and Difficulty
regions.description: Difficulty does not gate the listed trophies, and free-roam cleanup remains available after story completion.

regions.name: Hardest Completion Check
regions.description: Requires all Journal notes and effectively represents full base-game completion discipline.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle The Order of Giants DLC
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: The Order of Giants is a Rome-focused story DLC. Follow this sequence to unlock it correctly, clear the chapter efficiently, and complete the DLC collectible set.

creatures.name: Step 1: Check DLC Access
creatures.description: Released September 4, 2025. Included with Premium Edition/Upgrade and Collector bundles; base game required.

creatures.name: Step 2: Reach Required Story Point
creatures.description: Advance main story until Vatican progress allows DLC start, including the related progression objective checkpoint.

creatures.name: Step 3: Start A Mystery Begins
creatures.description: Meet Father Ricci near the Vatican Fountain of Confession to begin the DLC route.

creatures.name: Step 4: Enter Villa Pia Route
creatures.description: Follow Pio, access Ricci's office, collect key items, and push into the Casina/Villa Pia objective chain.

creatures.name: Step 5: Clear Rome Chapter
creatures.description: Complete the connected Rome story thread across underground routes, chambers, and puzzle-heavy segments.

creatures.name: Step 6: Collect DLC Completion Set
creatures.description: Collect 118 Journal Notes, 7 Mithraic Artifacts, and complete all Rome Mysteries plus book abilities.

creatures.name: Step 7: Finish Trophy/Achievement Targets
creatures.description: Wrap story completion, remaining mysteries, artifact checks, and the optional cat interaction objective.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Platforms and PC Requirements
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Before buying or installing, check platform availability, edition benefits, Game Pass coverage, and PC hardware tiers including ray tracing requirements.

items.name: Xbox Series X|S
items.description: Available with Xbox ecosystem support and Play Anywhere benefits when purchased through Xbox.

items.name: Steam and PlayStation 5
items.description: Steam supports PC requirements and achievements; PS5 supports the full trophy route including Platinum.

items.name: Nintendo Switch 2
items.description: Listed as available with release date May 12, 2026 for portable play coverage.

items.name: Game Pass Access
items.description: Available through Game Pass options for Xbox Series X|S, Xbox PC, and cloud-supported play paths.

items.name: Standard vs Premium
items.description: Standard includes the base game; Premium adds The Order of Giants DLC and bundled digital extras.

items.name: PC Requirements
items.description: Minimum 1080p tier starts at RTX 2060 SUPER / RX 6600 class; higher tiers target 1440p and 4K with stronger ray tracing GPUs.

unlockMilestones: Check hardware ray tracing support before install.
Confirm SSD capacity: 126 GB plus additional DLC space.
Match edition choice to DLC and bonus content goals.
Use platform-specific ecosystem features to reduce total cost.

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Farming and Growth
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Growth is part of real progression in Indiana Jones and the Great Circle. Farming is not only about planting and harvesting, but also about setting up repeatable material routes that keep your tools, weapons, and crafting options flowing.

sections.name: Seed Progression
sections.description: Planting and fertilizing seeds is a real milestone in the game, and harvesting a fully-grown nut is part of the same growth path.

sections.name: Material Farming
sections.description: A practical early farming loop is creating Mercury Capsules, which spawn small slimes that drop Tendrils and goo for repeatable crafting materials.

sections.name: Tool Sustain
sections.description: Resource farming becomes much stronger once you can consistently gather Osmium, glass shards, plants, and slime materials for follow-up crafts.

sections.name: Base Routine
sections.description: The best farming setup supports more than food. It should feed your storage, movement tools, weapon upgrades, and future fusion experiments.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Best Early Unlocks
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: The strongest early unlocks are the ones that improve safety, storage, and movement. In Indiana Jones and the Great Circle, a few practical upgrades can make the entire rest of the game much smoother.

priorities.name: Personal base camp
priorities.description: As soon as you get access to your personal base camp, your run becomes much more stable. It acts as a reliable hub for storage, building, and regrouping.

priorities.name: Frost Pick
priorities.description: A fast and cheap early mining tool made from Osmium and Stick. It is one of the most useful upgrades for accelerating early resource collection.

priorities.name: Cache Cube
priorities.description: Storage pressure starts early, so getting your first dependable chest-style container is a major quality-of-life upgrade.

priorities.name: Hookshot
priorities.description: The hookshot is one of the clearest movement milestones in the game and quickly makes exploration faster and safer.

priorities.name: Glider Glove
priorities.description: The glider glove adds another major mobility boost and makes long-distance movement far more efficient.

priorities.name: Projectile Wand or Bombs
priorities.description: A ranged tool or explosive option gives you a safer answer to dangerous enemies and trial-style encounters.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Achievement Tracker
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle currently has 19 Steam achievements, and they naturally split into exploration, crafting, mobility, combat, and growth progression.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Singleplayer and Platform FAQ
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: These are the core platform and access questions players keep asking before buying Indiana Jones and the Great Circle.

faqs.question: Is Indiana Jones and the Great Circle singleplayer?
faqs.answer: Yes. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle is a singleplayer game.

faqs.question: Is multiplayer or co-op planned?
faqs.answer: No. Multiplayer is not planned for release or future updates.

faqs.question: Where can I play Indiana Jones and the Great Circle?
faqs.answer: It is currently available on Steam for Windows.

faqs.question: How much does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle cost?
Does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle support controllers?
faqs.answer: Yes, but controller play is not recommended because the menus are not designed around it.

faqs.question: Does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle work on Steam Deck?
faqs.answer: Yes. Proton 9.0 or 9.0.4 is the commonly recommended setup for Steam Deck.

faqs.question: Does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle work on Linux?
faqs.answer: Yes. Proton 9.0 is reported to work well for Linux and Steam Deck.

faqs.question: Will Mac or Android be supported?
faqs.answer: They may be supported in the future, but they are not current launch platforms.

faqs.question: Does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle have translations?
faqs.answer: No. There are currently no translations planned.

faqs.question: Will Indiana Jones and the Great Circle keep getting updates?
faqs.answer: Yes. Some content updates are planned after release, but they are not intended to continue on an indefinite regular schedule.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Steam Deck and Controller
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle can run on Steam Deck, but the default setup may need adjustment. Keyboard and mouse remains the smoother option for menus and general play.

faqs.question: Does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle work on Steam Deck?
faqs.answer: Yes. Proton 9.0 works well, and Proton 9.0.4 is a commonly shared fix for Steam Deck issues.

faqs.question: What should I do if Steam Deck controls are not working?
faqs.answer: Force compatibility and switch the game to Proton 9.0.4. The default configuration may not accept controller input correctly.

faqs.question: Does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle support controllers?
faqs.answer: Yes, but controller play is not recommended because the game's menus are not designed around it.

faqs.question: Is Linux support possible?
faqs.answer: Yes. Proton 9.0 is reported to work well for Linux and Steam Deck.

faqs.question: What is the best input setup?
faqs.answer: Keyboard and mouse is the smoothest option for menu navigation and general moment-to-moment play.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Settings and Accessibility
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle already has a few practical settings and compatibility notes that matter immediately when players first launch the game.

settings.name: Display Settings
settings.description: Display Settings includes an option that lets players hide the on-screen hands.

settings.name: Graphics Compatibility
settings.description: Vulkan support is required for the graphics to render properly. Systems without Vulkan can run into crashes and severe graphical glitches.

settings.name: Input Preference
settings.description: Controller support exists, but keyboard and mouse gives a smoother experience because menus are not built around controller use.

settings.name: Language Support
settings.description: The current setup is English-only, and no translations are planned right now.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Updates and Patch Notes
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle is already receiving quick post-launch fixes and small usability updates.

entries.title: Update 2.8.2
entries.description: Renamed "awaken" to "exit" in the main menu.

entries.title: Small Patch for Start-Up Crashes
entries.description: A dedicated patch was released for players whose game was crashing on launch.

entries.title: Post-Launch Content Support
entries.description: Some content updates are planned after release, but they are not intended to continue on an indefinite regular schedule.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Crash Fix and Troubleshooting
lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: Most immediate launch and crash issues should be checked in a simple order: patch level, graphics support, platform compatibility, and logs.

steps.title: Install the Latest Crash Hotfix
steps.description: If the game is crashing on start, update first and test again with the latest start-up crash patch.

steps.title: Check Vulkan Support
steps.description: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle requires Vulkan support. Systems without Vulkan can suffer from crashes or major rendering problems.

steps.title: Use Proton 9.0.4 on Steam Deck
steps.description: If Steam Deck input or launch behavior is broken, force compatibility and switch to Proton 9.0.4.

steps.title: Collect Crash Logs
steps.description: Open Windows Run, paste %APPDATA%, go to lucid blocks/logs, and gather the .txt files for troubleshooting.

steps.title: Report the Issue Properly
steps.description: Share the logs and device details through the official Discord bug-reports forum or on the Steam community page.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Indiana Jones and the Great Circle

questions.question: Is Indiana Jones and the Great Circle a singleplayer game?
questions.answer: Yes. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle is a singleplayer-only game with no multiplayer or co-op planned.

questions.question: What is the Adventure Progression system in Indiana Jones and the Great Circle?
questions.answer: Adventure Progression is Indiana Jones and the Great Circle' freeform fusion crafting system. Instead of following fixed recipes, you combine materials and discover your own crafting paths.

questions.question: Where can I play Indiana Jones and the Great Circle?
questions.answer: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle is currently available on Steam for Windows. Linux and Steam Deck support is available through Proton 9.0.

questions.question: How much does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle cost?
questions.answer: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle costs $9.99 on Steam.

questions.question: Does Indiana Jones and the Great Circle support controllers?
questions.answer: Yes, but controller play is not recommended because the menus are not designed around it. Keyboard and mouse is the smoother option.

questions.question: Will Indiana Jones and the Great Circle receive updates?
questions.answer: Yes. Some content updates are planned after release, but they are not intended to continue on an indefinite regular schedule.
